design_philosophy: A visually stunning, modern agricultural SaaS marketplace landing page. Fusing organic earthiness with high-tech glassmorphism, vibrant gradients, and smooth scroll animations. Built to inspire trust among Indian farmers while showcasing world-class technology.

motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveal: Use Framer Motion for fade-up and stagger effects on scroll
motion_and_interactions.floating_elements: Use Framer Motion to create slow, continuous vertical floating animations for decorative background elements

hero.style: Glassmorphism card overlaid on a vibrant gradient background with floating abstract spheres. Large headline using Outfit font, gradient text for emphasis. Two CTA buttons: Primary solid green, Secondary outline.

feature_cards.style: Modern bento box grid. Glassmorphism or pristine white cards with subtle borders (border-slate-100) and soft ambient shadows (shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]). Each card should have a prominent icon (Lucide React) enclosed in a soft green circle.
feature_cards.layout: Use col-span-2 for highlighted features, col-span-1 for standard features.

how_it_works.style: Vertical timeline or connecting steps layout. Use high-contrast numbered badges.
how_it_works.layout: Flex column or grid with connected dashed lines.

stats_section.style: Dark background (bg-green-900) or rich green gradient section to break up the page. Large white typography for numbers.

hero_farmer.description: Indian farmer using smartphone, representing modern agriculture and tech adoption.

sunset_field.description: Beautiful golden hour sunset over agricultural field for background ambiance or stats section.

drone_farming.description: Drone spraying crops, perfect for showcasing advanced technology features.

farmer_portrait.description: Authentic portrait of an Indian farmer for the testimonial or community section.

media.icons: Use lucide-react for all interface icons. Keep stroke-width to 1.5 or 2 for a clean, modern look.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure green text on light backgrounds meets WCAG AA standards. Use text-green-800 for better readability instead of raw primary green if contrast is low.
accessibility.aria_labels: All interactive elements and icons must have descriptive aria-labels.
accessibility.testing_attributes: Add data-testid to all buttons, links, and major sections.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use framer-motion heavily for on-scroll animations and micro-interactions.
Implement the 'Glassmorphism' effect securely using Tailwind backdrop-blur utilities.
Ensure responsive design is mobile-first, prioritizing touch targets for the target audience.
Include English and Hindi text in the UI to satisfy the bilingual requirement. Keep it localized seamlessly.
Do not use Shadcn for the main marketing layouts. Build custom with standard HTML/Tailwind.
Install lucide-react and framer-motion if not already present.
Make sure to use CSS gradients and floating abstract shapes (using simple border-radius and blur in CSS) to add the 'Wow' factor.
